name: redirects
description: Validate all HTTP redirects from project.redirects.js: each source must return 301/302 with Location pointing to its destination

testCases.name: each source URL should redirect to its destination
steps: Import redirect rules from project.redirects.js using createRequire(import.meta.url)
For each rule: GET source with maxRedirects=0 to capture the raw redirect response
Assert status is 301 when permanent:true, 302 when permanent:false
Assert Location header contains destination path
assertions: Response status matches permanent flag (301 or 302)
Location header contains the destination URL
